summary: Backend testing complete for Staff Portal Quick Award, Validate Reward, Staff Transactions, and SwiftPOS Integration endpoints. All 28 tests passed (100% success rate).
critical_code_review_comments: SwiftPOS webhook authentication: SWIFTPOS_WEBHOOK_KEY env var is not set in test environment, so X-SwiftPOS-Key header auth will always fail. In production, this key must be configured.
Points calculation uses 1 point per $1 base with tier multiplier - working correctly
Audit trail properly logs to both staff_transactions and loyalty_transactions collections
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for quick awards and SwiftPOS sales (receipt_ref contains TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Staff Portal Quick Award, Validate Reward, Staff Transactions, and SwiftPOS Integration endpoints are working correctly. The validate-reward endpoint returns 404 for all QR codes since no redemptions exist in test data (expected behavior). SwiftPOS webhook can be authenticated via staff Bearer token OR X-SwiftPOS-Key header (env var not set in test env). Test user luna@test.com has admin role so can access staff endpoints.

quick_award: POST /api/perks/quick-award (PASS) - Quick points award with tier multiplier
spending_categories: GET /api/perks/spending-categories (PASS) - Returns 7 categories (food, drinks, entry, booth, bottle_service, merchandise, general)
swiftpos_integration: POST /api/perks/swiftpos/sale (PASS) - Matched sale by email awards points
POST /api/perks/swiftpos/sale (PASS) - Unmatched sale logged for reconciliation
end_to_end: Full staff portal flow (PASS) - Categories → Search → Award → Verify in log → Check summary

mocked_apis.SwiftPOS webhook: Ready for integration but no actual SwiftPOS POS connected. Endpoint accepts HTTP POSTs and processes them. X-SwiftPOS-Key auth requires SWIFTPOS_WEBHOOK_KEY env var to be set in production.
